creator: marko.cupac@mimar.rs
text:
(In reply to Matthias Fechner from comment #12)

I was also re-trying builds (after fetching portsnap) and it failed multiple times. Finally, it build fine a few minutes ago. I'm using ccache, I had some problems with it in the past, could it be related? Or something in ports infrastructure? I don't see any changes to the port itself since quite some time.
